display.name: Murmuration
display.author: prism
display.blurb: Thousands of starlings emergently flocking against a dusk sky, their swarm shape morphing on the music's pulse.

annotation.technical_notes: A dense cellular particle system is projected onto a 3D plane, creating a bubbling, organic texture reminiscent of boiling mud or foam. High-frequency micro-vibrations are driven by a per-pixel warp shader, while bass transients trigger dramatic vertical eruptions via beat-gated bursts. The earthy copper palette is defined by procedural noise and subtle lighting calculations within the composite shader.
